mapper.select: SELECT file_id, file_name, original_name, file_path, file_url, file_type, file_size, file_category, related_id, upload_user_id, create_time FROM file_info WHERE file_id = #{fileId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO file_info (file_name, original_name, file_path, file_url, file_type, file_size, file_category, related_id, upload_user_id) VALUES (#{fileName}, #{originalName}, #{filePath}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{fileCategory}, #{relatedId}, #{uploadUserId})
